---
title: "protein_elastic"
author: "WJOY"
date: "2025-07-31"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
library(car)
library(glmnet)
library(caret)
library(glmnetUtils)
library(dplyr)
library(missRanger)
```

```{r}
ml_test_data <- read.csv("ml_data.csv")
exclude_cols <- c("f.eid", "f.21001.0.0")
cols_to_transform <- setdiff(colnames(ml_test_data), exclude_cols)

set.seed(123)
n <- nrow(ml_test_data)
train_index <- sample(1:n, size = floor(0.7 * n))
test_index <- setdiff(1:n, c(train_index))

train <- ml_test_data[train_index, c(cols_to_transform, exclude_cols), drop = FALSE]
test <- ml_test_data[test_index, c(cols_to_transform, exclude_cols), drop = FALSE]
```

```{r}
pt_cols <- grep("_pt$", colnames(train), value = TRUE)
pt_missing_rate <- sapply(train[, pt_cols], function(x) mean(is.na(x)))
summary(pt_missing_rate)
hist(pt_missing_rate, breaks = 50, col = "skyblue",
     main = "Distribution of Missing Rate for _pt Columns",
     xlab = "Missing Rate", ylab = "Number of Columns")
```
```{r}
library(e1071)

analyze_protein_skewness <- function(df, protein_cols, skew_threshold = 1, right_skew_threshold = 1) {
  skew_values <- sapply(df[, protein_cols], skewness, na.rm = TRUE)
  result_df <- data.frame(
    Protein = names(skew_values),
    Skewness = skew_values,
    Recommend_Log = skew_values > skew_threshold
  )
  hist(skew_values, breaks = 50, col = "skyblue",
       main = "Skewness Distribution of Protein Intensities",
       xlab = "Skewness", ylab = "Number of Proteins")
  abline(v = skew_threshold, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
  cat(sprintf("totall protein:%d\n", length(skew_values)))
  cat(sprintf("Skewness > %.1f proteins:%d\n", skew_threshold, sum(result_df$Recommend_Log)))
  cat(sprintf("Skewness > %.1f proportion:%.2f%%\n",
              right_skew_threshold,
              mean(skew_values > right_skew_threshold) * 100))

  return(result_df)
}

protein_cols <- grep("_p$", colnames(train), value = TRUE)
skew_report <- analyze_protein_skewness(train, protein_cols)
```


```{r}
protein_cols <- grep("_p$", colnames(train), value = TRUE)

get_protein_stats <- function(df, protein_cols) {
  stats <- data.frame(
    Protein = protein_cols,
    Mean = sapply(df[, protein_cols], mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sapply(df[, protein_cols], sd, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = sapply(df[, protein_cols], min, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = sapply(df[, protein_cols], max, na.rm = TRUE),
    NA_Count = sapply(df[, protein_cols], function(x) sum(is.na(x)))
  )
  return(stats)
}

train_stats <- get_protein_stats(train, protein_cols)
test_stats <- get_protein_stats(test, protein_cols)

```

```{r}
summary(train_stats$Mean)
summary(train_stats$SD)
summary(train_stats$NA_Count)
summary(test_stats$Mean)
summary(test_stats$SD)
summary(test_stats$NA_Count)
```

```{r}
na_rate_before_train <- sapply(train[, pt_cols], function(x) mean(is.na(x)))
cat(sprintf("lack raio:%.2f%%\n", mean(na_rate_before_train) * 100))
cat(sprintf("colme:%d\n", sum(na_rate_before_train > 0)))
```


```{r}
pt_medians <- sapply(train[, pt_cols], function(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE))

fill_pt_missing <- function(df, pt_medians) {
  for (col in names(pt_medians)) {
    if (col %in% colnames(df)) {
      df[[col]][is.na(df[[col]])] <- pt_medians[[col]]
    }
  }
  return(df)
}

train <- fill_pt_missing(train, pt_medians)
test <- fill_pt_missing(test, pt_medians)
```

```{r}
na_rate_after_train <- sapply(train[, pt_cols], function(x) mean(is.na(x)))
cat(sprintf("lack raio:%.2f%%\n", mean(na_rate_after_train) * 100))
cat(sprintf("colme:%d\n", sum(na_rate_after_train > 0)))
```

```{r}
model_list <- list()

for (i in seq_along(protein_cols)) {
  prot <- protein_cols[i]
  pt <- pt_cols[i]
  adj_name <- paste0(prot, "_adj")

  dat_train <- data.frame(y = train[[prot]], x = train[[pt]])
  model <- lm(y ~ x, data = dat_train)
  model_list[[prot]] <- model

  train[[adj_name]] <- residuals(model)

  dat_test <- data.frame(y = test[[prot]], x = test[[pt]])
  pred_test <- tryCatch({
    predict(model, newdata = dat_test)
  }, error = function(e) rep(NA, nrow(test)))

  test[[adj_name]] <- test[[prot]] - pred_test
}

saveRDS(model_list, file = "protein_lm_models.rds")
```


```{r}
adj_cols <- grep("_adj$", colnames(train), value = TRUE)
scaled_train <- scale(train[, adj_cols])

scaling_attrs <- list(
  center = attr(scaled_train, "scaled:center"),
  scale = attr(scaled_train, "scaled:scale")
)

train[, adj_cols] <- as.data.frame(scaled_train)

test[, adj_cols] <- scale(
  test[, adj_cols],
  center = scaling_attrs$center,
  scale = scaling_attrs$scale
)
saveRDS(pt_medians, "pt_train_median.rds")
saveRDS(scaling_attrs, "pro_adj_scaling.rds")
```

```{r}
train_stats_after <- get_protein_stats(train, adj_cols)
test_stats_after <- get_protein_stats(test, adj_cols)
summary(train_stats_after$Mean)
summary(train_stats_after$SD)
summary(test_stats_after$Mean)
summary(test_stats_after$SD)
```

```{r}
key_cols <- c("f.eid", "f.21001.0.0")
final_cols <- c(key_cols, adj_cols)

train <- train[, final_cols]
test  <- test[, final_cols]

X_train <- as.matrix(train[, !(colnames(train) %in% c("f.eid", "f.21001.0.0"))])
y_train <- train$f.21001.0.0

X_test <- as.matrix(test[, !(colnames(test) %in% c("f.eid", "f.21001.0.0"))])
y_test <- test$f.21001.0.0
```

```{r}
# baseline
baseline_mse <- mean((y_test - mean(y_train))^2)
total_variance <- mean((y_test - mean(y_test))^2)

baseline_r2 <- 1 - (baseline_mse / total_variance)
baseline_mse
print(baseline_r2)
```

```{r}
# lambda test
ridge_cv <- cv.glmnet(X_train, y_train, alpha = 0)
lasso_cv <- cv.glmnet(X_train, y_train, alpha = 1)
elastic_cv <- cv.glmnet(X_train, y_train, alpha = 0.5)

best_lambda_ridge <- ridge_cv$lambda.min
best_lambda_lasso <- lasso_cv$lambda.min
best_lambda_elastic <- elastic_cv$lambda.min

cat("Ridge best λ:", best_lambda_ridge, "\n")
cat("LASSO best λ:", best_lambda_lasso, "\n")
cat("Elastic best λ:", best_lambda_elastic, "\n")
```

```{r}
# ridge model
ridge_model <- glmnet(X_train, y_train, family = "gaussian", alpha = 0)
print(ridge_model)
ridge_model_df <- as.matrix(ridge_model)
write.csv(ridge_model_df, file = "ridge_model_pro.csv")
plot(ridge_model, label = TRUE)
plot(ridge_model, xvar = "lambda", label = TRUE)
ridge_coef <- predict(ridge_model, s = best_lambda_ridge, type = "coefficients")
print(ridge_coef)
ridge_coef_df <- as.matrix(ridge_coef)
write.csv(ridge_coef_df, file = "ridge_coef_pro.csv")
plot(ridge_model, xvar = "dev", label = TRUE)

ridge_predictions <- predict(ridge_model, newx = X_test, s = best_lambda_ridge, type = "response")
plot(ridge_predictions, y_test, 
     xlab = "Predicted BMI", ylab = "Actual BMI", 
     main = "Ridge Regression: Predicted vs Actual", col = "blue", pch = 19)
abline(0, 1, col = "red")
ridge_resid <- ridge_predictions - y_test
ridge_mse <- mean(ridge_resid^2)
cat("Ridge Regression (MSE):", ridge_mse)
ridge_mae <- mean(abs(ridge_resid))
cat("Ridge Regression (MAE):", ridge_mae)
ridge_ss_total <- sum((y_test - mean(y_test))^2)
ridge_ss_res <-sum(ridge_resid^2)
ridge_r_squared <- 1 - (ridge_ss_res / ridge_ss_total)
cat("Ridge Regression (r_squared):", ridge_r_squared)
ridge_n <- 1000
ridge_p <- ncol(X_test)
ridge_adjusted_r_squared <- 1 - (1 - ridge_r_squared) * ((ridge_n -1 ) / (ridge_n - ridge_p - 1))
cat("Ridge Regression (adjusted_r_squared):", ridge_adjusted_r_squared)
```

```{r}
#lasso model
lasso_model <- glmnet(X_train, y_train, family = "gaussian", alpha = 1)
print(lasso_model)
lasso_model_df <- as.matrix(lasso_model)
write.csv(lasso_model_df, file = "lasso_model_pro.csv")
plot(lasso_model, xvar = "lambda", label = TRUE)
lasso_coef <- predict(lasso_model, s = best_lambda_lasso, type = "coefficients")
lasso_coef
lasso_coef_df <- as.matrix(lasso_coef)
write.csv(lasso_coef_df, file = "lasso_coef_pro.csv")
lasso_predictions <- predict(lasso_model, newx = X_test, s = best_lambda_lasso, type = "response")
plot(lasso_predictions, y_test, 
     xlab = "Predicted BMI", ylab = "Actual BMI", 
     main = "Lasso Regression: Predicted vs Actual", col = "blue", pch = 19)
abline(0, 1, col = "red")
lasso_resid <- lasso_predictions - y_test
lasso_mse <- mean(lasso_resid^2)
cat("Lasso Regression (MSE):", lasso_mse)
lasso_mae <- mean(abs(lasso_resid))
cat("Lasso Regression (MAE):", lasso_mae)
lasso_ss_total <- sum((y_test - mean(y_test))^2)
lasso_ss_res <-sum(lasso_resid^2)
lasso_r_squared <- 1 - (lasso_ss_res / lasso_ss_total)
cat("Lasso Regression (r_squared):", lasso_r_squared)
lasso_n <- 1000
lasso_p <- ncol(X_test)
lasso_adjusted_r_squared <- 1 - (1 - lasso_r_squared) * ((lasso_n -1 ) / (lasso_n - lasso_p - 1))
cat("Lasso Regression (adjusted_r_squared):", lasso_adjusted_r_squared)
```
```{r}
n_selected <- sum(lasso_coef[-1] != 0)
cat("Number of selected proteins:", n_selected, "\n")
```


```{r}
# elastic net
set.seed(123)
log_lambda_range <- seq(-4, 0.2, by = 0.1)  
lambda_range <- 10^log_lambda_range        
alpha_values <- seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.1) 
grid <- expand.grid(.alpha = alpha_values, .lambda = lambda_range)
control <- trainControl(method = "cv",number = 10) 
train <- train %>% select(-f.eid)
enet_train <- train(
  f.21001.0.0 ~ ., 
  data = train, 
  method = "glmnet", 
  trControl = control, 
  tuneGrid = grid
)
print(enet_train$bestTune)
print(enet_train$results)
```
```{r}
write.csv(enet_train$results, file = "enet_train_results_pro.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}
enet_train$resample
plot(enet_train)
summary(enet_train)
```

```{r}
best_alpha <- 0.9
best_lambda <- 0.0448107171
final_model <- glmnet(
  x = X_train, 
  y = y_train, 
  alpha = best_alpha, 
  lambda = best_lambda, 
  family = "gaussian"
)

predicted <- predict(final_model, newx = X_test, s = best_lambda)
coef(final_model)
mse <- mean((predicted - y_test)^2)
mae <- mean(abs(predicted - y_test))
rsquared <- 1 - sum((predicted - y_test)^2) / sum((y_test - mean(y_test))^2)
rsq <- cor(predicted,y_test)^2
cat("MSE: ", mse, "\n")
cat("MAE: ", mae, "\n")
cat("R-squared: ", rsquared, "\n")
cat("R-squared: ", rsq, "\n")
plot(final_model, xvar = "lambda", label = TRUE)
```
```{r}
elastic_coef <- coef(final_model)
elastic_coef_df <- as.matrix(elastic_coef)
write.csv(elastic_coef_df, file = "elastic_coef_pro.csv")
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
n_boot <- 100
nonzero_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = ncol(X_train), ncol = n_boot)
mse_list <- numeric(n_boot)

for (i in 1:n_boot) {
  idx <- sample(1:nrow(X_train), replace = TRUE)
  x_boot <- X_train[idx, ]
  y_boot <- y_train[idx]

  model_boot <- glmnet(x_boot, y_boot, alpha = best_alpha, lambda = best_lambda)
  
  coef_i <- as.vector(coef(model_boot))[-1]
  nonzero_matrix[, i] <- as.numeric(coef_i != 0)

  pred <- predict(model_boot, newx = X_test, s = best_lambda)
  mse_list[i] <- mean((pred - y_test)^2)
}

var_names <- colnames(X_train)
select_freq <- rowSums(nonzero_matrix) / n_boot
names(select_freq) <- var_names

cat("Top 10 most stable variables:\n")
print(sort(select_freq, decreasing = TRUE)[1:10])

cat("\n MSE summary:\n")
print(summary(mse_list))

```

```{r}
stable_vars <- sort(select_freq[select_freq > 0.6], decreasing = TRUE)
print(stable_vars)
length(stable_vars) / length(select_freq)
```

```{r}
saveRDS(final_model, file = "elastic_net_model_pro.rds") 
```
